/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/v16.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/v16.dir/v16_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v16.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v16.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v16.dir/mydrawingwidget.cpp.o -o v16  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6PdfWidgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Pdf.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
